_meta.description: Alta Investments — Sovereign Trading System. Complete research history v001→present.
_meta.purpose: Oracle reads this every reflection cycle. Never re-proposes rejected hypotheses unless rejection_reason is addressed. Builds on proven findings, not from scratch.

methodology_notes.retro_validation_blind_spot: Exit rules (hold caps, trailing multipliers, VIX gates) cannot be validated by retro_validate.py. The forensics 'hold' field records actual trade duration, not whether a forced cap fired. Proved 2026-05-27: L-5 retro delta=-0.087, backtester showed opposite direction. Always use run_forex_scan.py --backtest for exit rule validation.
methodology_notes.entry_vs_exit_rule_classification: Entry rules: session, grade, pd_alignment, score thresholds, commitment gates — retro valid. Exit rules: PAIR_HOLD_OVERRIDES, PAIR_TRAILING_OVERRIDES, PAIR_VIX_GATES — backtester only.

proven_lessons.lesson: Grade labels invert quality. Score is signal. Grade is noise.
proven_lessons.mechanism: ICT A+ grade selects for over-confirmation bias. High composite scores attract bad setups (overconfirmed = market already moved, late entry). A grade (7.0-9.5) = genuinely balanced entry. A+ (>9.5) = potentially chasing.
proven_lessons.rule: if grade == 'A+': downgrade to 'A' for trade decision. Never block A+ outright — the commitment gate handles the bad ones.
proven_lessons.evidence: A+: 13% WR, -0.375R avg (n=30). Grade A: 39% WR, +0.383R avg (n=72). Delta WR: -26pp.

proven_lessons.lesson: Session quality is categorical. NY_PM is not weaker — it is anti-edge.
proven_lessons.mechanism: NY_PM session has systematic adverse flow (smart money distribution into retail continuation buyers). London session captures institutional displacement before retail participation. The difference is not magnitude — it is direction of edge.
proven_lessons.evidence: NY_PM: -0.283R avg. London: +0.471R avg. 102-trade sample. MC pass rate 58% → 90% post-veto.

proven_lessons.lesson: pd_alignment anti-predicts success. Premium/discount zone describes retail traps, not institutional flow.
proven_lessons.mechanism: ICT premium/discount theory says price in premium = short, discount = long. In practice, institutional accumulation happens in 'wrong' zones (aggressive entries). The pd_alignment score penalizes exactly the entries that work.
proven_lessons.rule: pd_alignment weight = 0.0 in scoring. Still computed and logged for monitoring.
proven_lessons.evidence: pd_alignment > 0: 20% WR. pd_alignment = 0: 35% WR. Delta WR: -15pp.
proven_lessons.retro_note: All 3 gates failed. pd_alignment weight already 0.0 — no code change required.

proven_lessons.lesson: Pullback entries outperform aligned entries 3:1 in R-multiple. Entry timing within direction matters as much as direction itself.
proven_lessons.mechanism: When 5d momentum is positive and you go long, you are chasing. When 5d momentum is negative and you go long (pullback), you are buying the dip into the structural thesis. Same directional edge, 3× better R because entry is more precise.
proven_lessons.evidence: Counter (<-0.2%): 52% WR, +0.331R avg. Aligned (>+0.2%): 52% WR, +0.107R avg. Same WR, 3× R differential.

proven_lessons.lesson: VIX term structure reveals carry regime health. Modest contango = healthy carry environment. Steep contango = nervousness with pockets of liquidity still flowing.
proven_lessons.mechanism: VIX slope (VIX3M - VIX): near zero = market pricing equal near/far-term risk = well-functioning carry regime. Large positive = fear premium concentrated in spot = potential for sudden unwinding. Inverse (negative) = backwardation = vol spike imminent.

proven_lessons.lesson: The exact target ICT setup: London session + Grade A + market committed. This is the only configuration with institutional-grade statistics.
proven_lessons.mechanism: London = institutional displacement before retail. Grade A = genuinely balanced entry. Committed market (mkt_struct < 1.5) = price is moving, not consolidating. All three conditions together select for the exact moment institutional order flow is accessible.
proven_lessons.rule: London session AND Grade A AND mkt_struct < 1.5 → full execution. Any condition missing → veto.
proven_lessons.evidence: London+GradeA+committed: WR=41%, avgR=+0.840, Sharpe proxy=2.093. MC prop pass rate 90.3%.
proven_lessons.code_location: ict/pipeline.py stage 5.7 — three-part gate: session + grade + commitment

proven_lessons.lesson: Macro momentum has pair-specific half-lives. There is no universal hold period. Each pair's macro signal exhausts at a different rate.
proven_lessons.mechanism: Central bank policy divergence creates directional flows that persist until the next CB catalyst. GBPUSD policy divergence (BOE vs Fed) has a 6-day momentum half-life. AUDUSD has a 5-day half-life. AUDNZD has a 7-day half-life. 60-day hold captures the thesis correctly but gives back gains during consolidation.
proven_lessons.rule: GBPUSD: 6d hold / 2.0× trailing. AUDUSD: 5d / 1.0×. EURUSD: 5d / 1.25×. AUDNZD: 7d / 1.25×. GBPJPY: 5d / 1.0×. USDCAD/USDJPY: 60d / 1.25× (no short-hold edge confirmed).
proven_lessons.evidence: Per-pair trailing sweep run 2026-05-19. GBPUSD 1.09→1.52 (+0.43). GBPJPY 0.653→0.741 (+0.088). Portfolio 1.055→1.071.

proven_lessons.lesson: Tighten USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate from 15 to 13. Bull market + VIX>13 = safe-haven flow corrupts rate signal.
proven_lessons.mechanism: Safe-haven flows activate before traditional risk-off thresholds. VIX 13-15 = confused regime on JPY crosses. AUDNZD: both AUD and NZD are risk currencies; cross rate loses macro signal in any moderately elevated risk environment.
proven_lessons.evidence: USDJPY: Sharpe 1.770 to 2.979 (n=46). AUDNZD: Sharpe 1.558 to 2.246 (n=39). Portfolio +0.242.
proven_lessons.retro_note: Exit rule — VIX value at entry not in forensics. Validate via backtester sweep at n>=100 per pair.
proven_lessons.caution: n=46 USDJPY, n=39 AUDNZD — retest when sample doubles

proven_lessons.lesson: Validated knowledge has an expiry date. REST_MODE is a gate, not a destination.
proven_lessons.mechanism: Proven-but-unimplemented hypotheses create false confidence. The pulse system now escalates at 2d/7d/14d.
proven_lessons.rule: Any CONFIRMED hypothesis must have implementation commit or REJECTED status within 14 days.
proven_lessons.evidence: Direct observation: HYP-046+HYP-047 confirmed 2026-05-26, unimplemented. Oracle flagged on first read.
proven_lessons.retro_note: Meta-process lesson — statistical validation not applicable.

proven_hypotheses.impact: Confirmed carry as the structural foundation of forex edge

proven_hypotheses.finding: Quarter-end rebalancing works at small sample
proven_hypotheses.impact: Confirmed seasonal signal but n too small to scale
proven_hypotheses.note: Scale test rejected (HYP-010). Valid signal, insufficient frequency.

proven_hypotheses.finding: v004 macro system (IRP + RRD) is the core forex edge
proven_hypotheses.impact: Established the macro layer as foundation. All subsequent versions build on this.

proven_hypotheses.finding: ICT FVG limit entry has positive EV
proven_hypotheses.impact: Validated ICT methodology. London FVG entry is real institutional edge.

proven_hypotheses.finding: ICT walk-forward B replicates training edge (within 1pp)
proven_hypotheses.impact: Confirmed no overfitting in ICT backtest. Edge is real.

proven_hypotheses.finding: Library bull regime CRITICAL false positive: floor size at 0.5× in bull regime
proven_hypotheses.result: GOLDILOCKS_LOW_VOL match at 0.934 caused 0.00× size. Floor fix restored equity trading.
proven_hypotheses.impact: Equity system was completely blocked. Fix restored live trading.

proven_hypotheses.finding: A+ grade paradox: score anti-correlated with success
London+GradeA+committed is the only institutional-grade ICT setup
Counter-momentum sizing: pullback entries 3× better R than aligned
VIX slope [0,1) is best forex entry environment
No single feature separates forex COMMITMENT_FAILUREs at IC>0.15
proven_hypotheses.impact: Accept structural ~40% entry failure rate. Size modifiers preferred over gates.

proven_hypotheses.finding: Short natural-duration trades underperform — entries before commitment formed
proven_hypotheses.mechanism: Fast closes = stops or TP1 scalps. Price moved briefly right then reversed. Entry before institutional commitment fully expressed.
proven_hypotheses.source: L-5 retro validation side-effect (forensics signal, not the rule being tested)
proven_hypotheses.action: Split forensics by hold_days bucket (1-3, 4-7, 8+) within London+GradeA subset. Minimum 20 trades per bucket.

rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: No edge without directional macro filter. Layer 1.5 requires Layer 3 alignment.
rejected_hypotheses.retestable_when: Only as size booster on top of confirmed macro direction, not standalone

rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Entry before price confirms = fighting drift. TENET 4 violation (being early = being wrong).
rejected_hypotheses.retestable_when: Never. Principle violation, not a data problem.

rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rate divergence is direction only. Without momentum confirmation, 20d hold gives back too much.
rejected_hypotheses.retestable_when: Rate divergence + momentum confirmation at 20d (not tested yet)

rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: BOJ and Fed policy cycles overwhelm the seasonal. Sample too small and event-driven.
rejected_hypotheses.retestable_when: Never at this sample size. Would need 30+ years.

rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Small sample (n=15) was survivorship noise. At n=366, fade has no edge.
Adding complexity (ML state allocation) hurt performance vs simple macro signal. Occam wins.
rejected_hypotheses.retestable_when: Only if macro signal itself degrades to below 0.5 Sharpe

rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Same as HYP-011. Complexity without edge improvement.
Longer hold HURTS: win rate collapses 38.8%→26.7% at 60d. The macro thesis needs shorter hold periods, not longer.
rejected_hypotheses.retestable_when: Never at 60d. Shorter holds confirmed superior.

rejected_hypotheses.finding: Calendar edges as v004 size boosts
rejected_hypotheses.result: +0.0014 Sharpe impact. Only 3.5% of trades in calendar windows.
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Calendar windows too infrequent to move portfolio-level Sharpe. March JPY only pair with any signal.
rejected_hypotheses.retestable_when: If trade frequency increases 3× or if calendar data extends back to 2000

rejected_hypotheses.result: Sharpe invariant across stop widths in 4200-combo sweep
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Hold period dominates entirely. Stop width is not a lever.

rejected_hypotheses.finding: Pure carry direction (rate sign) works standalone
rejected_hypotheses.result: Only GBPUSD, AUDUSD positive. USDJPY -0.555, EURUSD -5.636
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Large adverse moves dominate carry income. Carry works as income overlay inside macro signal, not as direction signal.
rejected_hypotheses.retestable_when: As a return enhancer (size boost) inside confirmed macro direction — not standalone

rejected_hypotheses.result: Pre-2020: 67% WR but avg R barely negative (-0.058, n=6)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: 2022 Fed hike cycle permanently broke March JPY seasonal. 6 occurrences not sufficient. Event-specific, not structural.

rejected_hypotheses.finding: Library CRITICAL match driven by equity dislocation features
rejected_hypotheses.result: Features are commodity/macro-driven, not equity crash precursors
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Current CRITICAL match (SHALE_SUPPLY_OIL_CRASH) is macro pattern, not equity dislocation. Bull regime floor fix was the correct response.
rejected_hypotheses.retestable_when: Re-evaluate if SPY goes below 200 SMA

rejected_hypotheses.finding: Forex COMMITMENT_FAILUREs resolvable by momentum threshold
rejected_hypotheses.result: Momentum distributions identical between unexplained losses and wins. No clean threshold.
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The third factor (if it exists) is not in daily price data. May require intraday data or cross-asset data not currently tracked.
rejected_hypotheses.retestable_when: When intraday ATR ratio data is added to signal computation

remaining_gap_ideas: USDCAD at 0.326 Sharpe — either find the signal or drop from portfolio
USDJPY at 1.004 Sharpe — BOJ intervention timing as size signal
Intraday ATR ratio as commitment proxy for forex (requires new data)
Cross-pair divergence as size reducer when pairs disagree on direction
